focus: adversarial re-verification pass over DR-001, DR-003, DR-005, DR-010 plus one forward-looking plugin search

targetSelection.selectionReason: operator selected four highest-stakes active P1s for hunter/skeptic/referee re-verification plus one plugin forward-search pass

searchLedger.hypothesis: DR-001 could be false or lower severity if the whole rendered block is finally clamped to maxInjectionChars

searchActions.result: prompt body is budgeted, but returned buildBlock is not final-clamped
test asserts structure and ellipsis, not whole block length <= maxInjectionChars

searchLedger.rationale: counterevidence did not show a whole-block cap; prior P1 remains accurate
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: false-positive/downgrade hypothesis rejected by current direct read

searchLedger.hypothesis: DR-003 could be false if stale verifier discard also prevents the subsequent continuation attempt

searchActions.result: stale state mutation is discarded when goalId changes, but maybeVerifyGoal still returns result
session idle always calls maybeContinueGoal after maybeVerifyGoal completes

searchLedger.rationale: no post-verifier goal-id check or stale-result signal was found before continuation
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: false-positive/downgrade hypothesis rejected by current direct read

searchLedger.hypothesis: DR-005 could be lower severity if current sanitizer is a comprehensive positive boundary rather than a blacklist

searchActions.result: sanitizer remains pattern blacklist plus whitespace/control normalization
tests cover known blacklist cases but do not prove a positive trust boundary

searchLedger.rationale: known blacklist cases pass, but user objective text still enters system context through blacklist sanitization
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: false-positive/downgrade hypothesis rejected by current direct read

searchLedger.hypothesis: DR-010 could be false if MK_GOAL_PLUGIN_DISABLED gates all mutation-capable tool paths

searchActions.result: disabled flag gates continuation and transform, while tools remain registered and call executeGoalAction
tests cover tool mutation paths and autonomy_disabled, but not disabled-env tool mutation boundary

searchLedger.rationale: tool mutations remain active when only passive injection/autonomy are disabled; documentation-boundary finding remains accurate
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: false-positive/downgrade hypothesis rejected by current direct read and exact search

searchLedger.hypothesis: there may be a new bug class in disabled-mode boundaries, stale verifier/continuation coupling, sanitizer/length caps, silent catches, or file mutation helpers not already covered by DR-001 through DR-010

searchActions.result: matches mapped to existing active findings or previously ruled-out state/logging/error-handling surfaces; no new class found

searchLedger.rationale: one scoped forward search produced no genuinely new bug class outside DR-001 through DR-010
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: no new bug class found in scoped direct search

detail: DR-001-P1-001 reverified as confirmed P1; no final whole-block maxInjectionChars clamp found.
DR-003-P1-001 reverified as confirmed P1; stale verifier discard does not stop subsequent continuation attempt.
DR-005-P1-001 reverified as confirmed P1; sanitizer remains blacklist before user objective text enters system context.
DR-010-P1-001 reverified as confirmed P1; disabled flag gates transform/autonomy but leaves mutation-capable tools active.

reason: Focused exact search over disabled-mode, verifier/continuation, sanitizer/length, silent catch, and file mutation surfaces found no genuinely new bug class.
